record.field: Following up on our meeting at SIAL Canada — CasaFolino

field.name: body_html
field.p: It was a pleasure meeting you at SIAL Canada in Montréal and discussing potential opportunities together.

Allow me to briefly introduce CasaFolino — an Italian family-owned company focused on structured retail and foodservice, specialised in the development and production of food products that combine perceived quality, industrial reliability, and sustainable market positioning.
Our approach is simple: to deliver products that perform on shelf and in kitchen — ensuring rotation, continuity, and margin — without relying on forced or unsustainable premium positioning.

We work across both branded and Private Label projects, with a KPI-driven mindset:
• balanced recipes designed for stability, shelf life, and consistency
• formats and packaging optimised for rotation and logistics efficiency
• pricing built for competitiveness and long-term sustainability
• reliable, scalable production processes

Our core product categories include:
• sweet & savoury spreads
• flavoured honeys and honey-based specialties
• ready-to-cook risottos
• condiments and accessible gourmet references

We offer flexible formats from 28 g up to 25 kg, supporting:
• Branded retail
• Private Label
• Foodservice & horeca
• Industrial & co-manufacturing projects

All products are manufactured in Italy under certified standards:
✔️ BRC & IFS
✔️ Halal & Kosher
✔️ Organic options on selected references
We would be glad to explore a potential collaboration and better understand your priorities.

p.strong: My Export Manager, Josefina Lazzaro (in CC), will be in touch with you shortly to take care of the commercial follow-up.

field.p:
Next steps could be:
• reviewing a specific category of interest
• evaluating branded or Private Label opportunities
• developing a tailored proposal (recipe · format · price positioning)
• or scheduling a short operational call to assess feasibility and timing
I remain at your full disposal and look forward to your feedback.

Antonio Folino
CEO & Founder — CasaFolino S.r.l. Società Benefit
casafolino.com | Lamezia Terme (CZ), Italy
